summary: Inverse 2-D DFT of a complex Spectrum back to a real spatial plane (Field1 for one channel, Image otherwise; full 1/(W*H) normalization, imaginary residual discarded).

inputs.name: spectrum
inputs.doc: The complex frequency spectrum to invert.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The reconstructed real spatial plane (Field1 for a single channel).

perceptual.reason: the inverse DFT is verified as the exact inverse of fft2 (reconstruction round trip within tolerance) and the DC-only-spectrum constant-plane fixture, not a perceptual metric
